title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Iran struck Muwaffaq Salti Air Base (Jordan); air sirens over Amman — conflict reaching 4th US-base country.
Tesla -14.5% (worst day since Mar-25), Alphabet -7.1% on $195-205B AI capex guidance → S&P 500 -1.2% Thu.
BTC ETF: -$225M outflows today snap 7-day/$981M inflow streak; BTC ~$65,400, Fear & Greed 28 (Fear).
FOMC Jul 28-29 in 4 days: hike probability ~35%, up 3x in a week on oil + AI-driven inflation.
